description: Resolves an entity's AABB against solid tilemap cells (a tile whose properties flag solid:true): stops at walls/ceilings, lands on floors, and exposes contact flags on entity.state (__onGround/__onCeiling/__onWallL/__onWallR). Order it AFTER the velocity integrator. The terrain half of platformer collision.

solidProp.description: Tile-property flag marking a solid cell (default "solid").
